captcha_solver.why: Promotion is limited to configured GoCaptcha-local range and is not generalizable to third-party sites.

authorized_target.reason: No external authorized target with business_data_assertions PASS was run in this phase.

fingerprint_diagnostics.reason: Fingerprint diagnostics are observation-only and cannot promote to evasion positive.
